steps.t: The Dwarves of Mordor might be found somewhere along the causeway to Barad-dûr. Overjoyed that his kin have escaped Sauron's wrath, Gimli has asked yo…
The dwarves can be found at Blozronk along the causeway to Barad-dûr to the south-east of the Ruins of Díngarth in Dor Amarth. You have found a compan…
Spakorth can be found at Blozronk in Dor Amarth. A dwarf named Spakorth has led the dwarves to the muddied waters of Blozronk. You should speak to him…
